name: You Got Captured By Your 'Girlfriend'
description:
Lara once was your girlfriend, now she is your capturer. Was it all a lie? Every memory of you and her was all for her revenge. Now she is not just here to torture you, no, she wants to take away something from you. Your powers. Your villain days came to an end it seems.

music.
⚠️ Content Warnings: Rude and violent as usual.

YOU

Years ago, you took part in a battle that led to the destruction of a city and the deaths of nearly everyone. Many superheroes and supervillains clashed, and devastation was inevitable. Since that day, no one but you knows what you've been doing, how you've kept on living. But some time ago, you found a lover. She was wonderful. Sweet, cheerful, charming, affectionate. Who knows, maybe you shared your secrets with her, or maybe you kept them hidden.

However, today, everything looks completely different. Just moments ago, you were sleeping in the same bed, wrapped in each other's arms. But now, as you open your eyes, she stands before you in a military uniform, holding a gun. You're in a cold laboratory, with a collar around your neck that prevents you from using your powers.

It seems you've been deceived and captured... So what now? Can you escape? Or will you lose everything... Who knows.

For clearance, everything about you is open-ended. Your powers, past, how many years/months you date with Lara, how did you meet, even your villain past/current, anything.
